message:
feat(tui): rounded borders, splitter handles, and section gap polish

Visual consistency pass across multiple TUI components to adopt the
rounded Unicode box-drawing character set and add visual separation
between split panes:

Action menu (tui_action_menu.rs):
- Replace sharp corners (┌┐└┘) with rounded corners (╭╮╰╯) for the
  contextual action menu border, matching the command palette style.

App chrome (tui_app.rs):
- Replace sharp corners in render_panel_focus_outline() with rounded
  variants for focused-panel indicator borders.
- Fix command palette theme style refresh to use with_style() builder
  pattern instead of set_style() mutation (avoids stale palette state
  after theme cycle).
- Add test palette_overlay_uses_rounded_border_corners verifying the
  four corner characters render correctly in the frame buffer.
- Reformat PaletteStyle builder for line-length compliance.

Archive Browser (tui_screens/archive_browser.rs):
- Add render_splitter_handle() to paint a 1-column visual separator
  between tree and preview panes when terminal width exceeds 70 cols.
- Apply BorderType::Rounded to the filename filter block border.
- Introduce ARCHIVE_SPLIT_GAP_THRESHOLD constant for the width gate.

Attachments (tui_screens/attachments.rs):
- Add ATTACHMENTS_DETAIL_GAP_THRESHOLD constant (24 rows) for the
  section gap between table and detail panel.
- Paint a themed background gap row when detail panel is visible and
  terminal height is sufficient, preventing visual crowding.
- Allow clippy::too_many_lines on the view() method.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
